GlobalVariables.StudyDescription: Pre-built REDCap instrument for HEARTLAND Protocol v3.3 data collection.

ItemDef.Name: bl_social_support_limited

Question.TranslatedText: Lives alone OR limited social support

ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: +1 point if Yes (single-item proxy for ENRICHD)

ItemDef.Name: bl_risk_score
ItemDef.redcap:Calculation: if([age]>=75,2,0) + if([bl_prior_hf_hosp_6mo]="1",3,0) + if([bl_egfr]<45,2,0) + if(([bl_np_type]="1" and [bl_np_value]>=500) or ([bl_np_type]="2" and [bl_np_value]>=1500),2,0) + if([bl_sbp_admit]<100,2,0) + if([bl_diabetes]="1",1,0) + if([bl_lvef_pct]<30,2,0) + if([bl_ckm_stage]>=3,2,0) + if([bl_distance_cardio_mi]>50,1,0) + if([bl_social_support_limited]="1",1,0)

Question.TranslatedText: Consent to complete KCCQ-12 at baseline and 12 months

ItemDef.Name: gdmt_classes_count
ItemDef.redcap:Calculation: if([gdmt_arni_acei_arb_drug]<>"0" and [gdmt_arni_acei_arb_drug]<>"",1,0) + if([gdmt_bb_drug]<>"0" and [gdmt_bb_drug]<>"",1,0) + if([gdmt_mra_drug]<>"0" and [gdmt_mra_drug]<>"",1,0) + if([gdmt_sglt2_drug]<>"0" and [gdmt_sglt2_drug]<>"",1,0)

ItemDef.Name: mo_track
ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: Track A = Bluetooth/app ; Track B = paper diary + phone

ItemDef.Name: mo_red_flag_count
ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: Weight gain >=5 lb/wk, worsening dyspnea, syncope, etc.

Question.TranslatedText: Days alive and out of hospital (0-365)
>=3 GDMT classes at target dose at 12 months
